$schema_note: SSOT for Cloudflare Pages APP-PLANE response headers (app.xlooop.com / invest / test / dev). Consumed by BOTH emitters: scripts/prepare-cloudflare-pages.mjs writes the static _headers file from it, and functions/_middleware.js re-applies it at the edge (CF Pages 'advanced mode' compiles functions/ into a _worker.js, which makes CF IGNORE the static _headers - so the middleware is the actually-effective layer; the _headers file remains for non-advanced-mode projects + as documentation). The API worker policy in src/workers/middleware/security-headers.ts is a SEPARATE, deliberately-stricter JSON-only-plane policy and is NOT governed by this manifest - do not merge them. Edit headers ONCE here; verify-app-security-header-parity.mjs asserts the live deploy matches this file.

global_headers.Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://unpkg.com https://browser.sentry-cdn.com https://clerk.xlooop.com https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://challenges.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://api.xlooop.com https://clerk.xlooop.com https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://*.ingest.sentry.io https://*.ingest.us.sentry.io https://sentry.io; worker-src 'self' blob:; frame-src 'self' https://challenges.cloudflare.com; report-uri /api/csp-report; report-to csp-endpoint

path_overrides.comment: CF Pages serves nested *.jsx as text/jsx; with nosniff the browser refuses the self-mounting widget sidecars (ProjectScopeBindingPanel/DbProjectDetail/DbWorkspaceOverview/SyntheticDomainsPanel/R51CockpitMount). Force a JS content-type. CF _headers splat '*' matches across '/'.
